name: Handoff Diet
description: Meta-skill codifying the no-wakeup-polling pattern. Describes the ScheduleWakeup anti-pattern (polling every N minutes burns context), the fix (--auto merge + detached watcher script), and when wakeups still make sense (truly unpredictable external state). Reduces handoff spam by ~80% in CI-watching and PR-cascade workflows.
author: Lucas Santana

pt-BR.name: Dieta de Handoff
pt-BR.description: Meta-skill que codifica o padrão sem polling de wakeup. Descreve o anti-padrão do ScheduleWakeup (polling de N em N minutos queima contexto), o fix (merge --auto + watcher destacado), e quando wakeups ainda fazem sentido (estado externo realmente imprevisível). Reduz spam de handoff em ~80% em fluxos de CI-watching e cascata de PRs.
